subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are steadfast in the Covenant! The divine Herald hath, in his letter, made mention of those two kind friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر پیمان حضرت بشیر ربانی در نامه خویش ذکر آن دو یار مهربان نموده که
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
